description_long: This is a life-sized zebra with a realistic build, featuring a robust body, slender legs, and a slightly arched neck. Its coat is covered in distinctive black and white stripes that run vertically along the body and horizontally around the legs, typical of the Plains zebra. The head is elongated with a pronounced snout, upright ears, and a short, bristly mane that stands erect along the neck. The tail is thin with a tuft of black hair at the end. The hooves are solid and dark, and the overall posture is alert and natural, as if the animal is standing still and observing its surroundings. The surface texture appears smooth with a matte finish, and the details of the stripes are sharply defined.
description: A realistic, life-sized zebra with sharply defined black and white stripes, upright ears, and a short, bristly mane, standing in a natural, alert posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the zebra's elongated face, upright ears, and the symmetry of its stripes down the center of the head and chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, the arched neck, and the pattern of stripes along the torso and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded hindquarters, the tail with a tuft, and the converging stripes on the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the body profile, head, and the distinctive striping pattern.
attribute_pose: Standing square with head held level and alert.
attribute_mane_style: Short, upright, and bristly along the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are firmly planted on the ground in a natural, weight-bearing stance.
